notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.7
Continuing the series of major updates to include preset grips in ever function that can use it. Also cleared various bugs reported.

All modules affect this update: RA Aberration Removal, Backgroundneutralization, Blink, CLAHE, Convo, Cosmic Clarity, Function Bundles, FX Module, HaloBGon, Morpho, RC Astro, Remove Green, Remove Stars, Syqon Tools, TextureClarity, WaveScaleHDR, WaveScaleDE, WhiteBalanc.
